patch.value: GH-516 (open, bug label, pm 2026.7.11). Repro: fresh mktemp workspace, PM_GLOBAL_PATH=<fresh dir>, pm init --json, install ONE local package (pm-changelog) --project, then pm package doctor --project --isolated --detail deep — installed_extensions contains pm-changelog PLUS pm-github and pm-graph (pm-graph's source referencing an unrelated prior temp workspace), total_extensions:3 all activation-ok, while details.isolation simultaneously claims isolated:true and global_extensions_included:false. Impact: hermetic package integration tests and agent sandboxes are nondeterministic — the doctor's own remediation recipe (PM_GLOBAL_PATH=$(mktemp -d)) cannot be trusted, and unrelated local source paths leak into freshly initialized project managed-state. Direction per issue: make ALL global package/default discovery honor PM_GLOBAL_PATH consistently during init; keep first-party seeding strictly behind --with-packages. Note the isolation-flag lie (isolated:true while leaking) is the sharpest wedge for root-causing.
GH-516: pm init seeds unrelated managed packages into fresh PM_GLOBAL_PATH workspaces

plain pm init with a fresh empty PM_GLOBAL_PATH creates a package-free project (no managed packages seeded without --with-packages or an explicit package/profile option); installing exactly one local package yields exactly one project-managed package in pm package doctor --project --isolated output; integration test initializes with an empty temp PM_GLOBAL_PATH, installs one package, and asserts isolated doctor reports only that package; root cause identified for how pm-github/pm-graph from the operator environment leaked in despite isolation claims

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live verification correction: current main is hermetic. In a fresh cwd with fresh PM_GLOBAL_PATH, plain init created no managed package file. Installing exactly /home/steve/GITHUB_RELEASE/pm-cli/packages/pm-guide-shell --project then running package doctor --project --isolated --detail deep reported total_extensions=1, managed_total=1, active_total=1, isolation.isolated=true, global_extensions_included=false, and global_diagnostics_present=false. No pm-github/pm-graph leakage reproduced.

patch.value: Already fixed on current main; isolated fresh-workspace package install/doctor proof reports exactly one project package and no global leakage.
